{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Strategy & Optimization Specialist",
  "description": "Jiji is the leading online marketplace in Pan-African countries, with over 200 million users from offices in 10 countries. We work every day to make sure that people have a place for safe buying and selling cars. We constantly improve the quality of service, and we always help our customers to seal deals.That&#39;s why now, to be of even more use, the company needs talented and motivated people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Strategy &amp; Optimization Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Own and execute multi-platform strategy (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, LinkedIn)
	Build data-backed content playbooks tailored to African audiences
	Create and scale viral-ready short-form video content
	Leverage AI tools to optimize content, workflows, and community management
	Run A/B tests and turn insights into growth strategies
	Drive measurable results: engagement, leads, and user acquisition.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	5+ years of experience in social media, digital growth, or creative strategy
	Experience managing multi-country (African market) accounts
	Strong grasp of analytics, KPIs, and performance optimization
	Skilled in tools like Canva, CapCut, and scheduling platforms
	Creative thinker with strong Naija-centric storytelling skills
	Bonus: Experience with paid ads (Meta, TikTok).
	Success = Growth in reach, engagement, and conversions + faster, smarter content execution powered by AI.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-03",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Jiji.ng"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "name": "",
    "value": "196900"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "minValue": 0,

    }

}



Social Media Strategy & Optimization Specialist Job at Jiji.ng




        
    

        
        Jiji is the leading online marketplace in Pan-African countries, with over 200 million users from offices in 10 countries. We work every day to make sure that people have a place for safe buying and selling cars. We constantly improve the quality of service, and we always help our customers to seal deals.That's why now, to be of even more use, the company needs talented and motivated people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Strategy & Optimization Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

What You’ll Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Own and execute multi-platform strategy (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, LinkedIn)
	Build data-backed content playbooks tailored to African audiences
	Create and scale viral-ready short-form video content
	Leverage AI tools to optimize content, workflows, and community management
	Run A/B tests and turn insights into growth strategies
	Drive measurable results: engagement, leads, and user acquisition.


What We’re Looking For


	5+ years of experience in social media, digital growth, or creative strategy
	Experience managing multi-country (African market) accounts
	Strong grasp of analytics, KPIs, and performance optimization
	Skilled in tools like Canva, CapCut, and scheduling platforms
	Creative thinker with strong Naija-centric storytelling skills
	Bonus: Experience with paid ads (Meta, TikTok).
	Success = Growth in reach, engagement, and conversions + faster, smarter content execution powered by AI.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Manager",
  "description": "Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our client, an International Brand in the Hospitality Industry that operates top notched Hotels within the mainland areas of Lagos, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Island and Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Due to increasing activities, our client urgently requires the servicers of a experienced HR Managers who has a minimum of 6 years&rsquo; experience in HR activities in the hospitality business preferably a top brand Hotel.
	Possession of a professional certificate will be an advantage.


Key Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Managing pensions and benefits administration
	Approving job descriptions and advertisements
	Looking after the health, safety and welfare of all employees
	Organising staff training
	Monitoring staff performance and attendance
	Advising line managers and other employees on employment law and the employer&#39;s own employment policies and procedures
	Ensuring candidates have the right to work at the organisation
	Advising on disciplinary and employee performance problems
	Recruitment and onboarding of new employees
	Preparation of monthly pay roll
	Developing programmes that enhance employee relations
	Ensuring employees have correct pay and benefits
	Delivering compensation and benefit comparison reports to the executive team
	Promoting equality, health and safety within the company
	Ensuring that company employment policies follow national laws and regulations
	Advising executives on matters of salaries, redundancy and employment law
	Recording and processing confidential information


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;bphotjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;jobmasters2020@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HR Manager Job at Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our client, an International Brand in the Hospitality Industry that operates top notched Hotels within the mainland areas of Lagos, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Locations: Island and Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Due to increasing activities, our client urgently requires the servicers of a experienced HR Managers who has a minimum of 6 years’ experience in HR activities in the hospitality business preferably a top brand Hotel.
	Possession of a professional certificate will be an advantage.


Key Duties & Responsibilities


	Managing pensions and benefits administration
	Approving job descriptions and advertisements
	Looking after the health, safety and welfare of all employees
	Organising staff training
	Monitoring staff performance and attendance
	Advising line managers and other employees on employment law and the employer's own employment policies and procedures
	Ensuring candidates have the right to work at the organisation
	Advising on disciplinary and employee performance problems
	Recruitment and onboarding of new employees
	Preparation of monthly pay roll
	Developing programmes that enhance employee relations
	Ensuring employees have correct pay and benefits
	Delivering compensation and benefit comparison reports to the executive team
	Promoting equality, health and safety within the company
	Ensuring that company employment policies follow national laws and regulations
	Advising executives on matters of salaries, redundancy and employment law
	Recording and processing confidential information


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our client, an International Brand that runs Hotels across major cities in Nigeria, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Island and Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Due to increasing activities, our client urgently requires the services of a professional and self-driven General Managers to pilot the affairs in some of its branches located in Lagos Island and Mainland.
	This person must possess a minimum of a First Degree and at least 8 years&rsquo; experience within the hospitality industry.
	Possession of a higher degree with some professional certifications are required.
	Having worked in similar position will be a great advantage


Duties and Responsibilities


	Oversee the operations functions of the hotel, as per the Organizational chart.
	Hold regular briefings and meetings with all heads of departments.
	Ensure full compliance with Hotel operating controls, SOPs, policies, procedures, and service standards.
	Lead all key property issues including capital projects, customer service, and refurbishment.
	Handling complaints, and overseeing the service recovery procedures.
	Responsible for the preparation, presentation, and subsequent achievement of the hotel&rsquo;s annual Operating&nbsp;Budget, Marketing, and sales Plan and Capital Budget.
	Manage the ongoing profitability of the hotel, ensuring revenue and guest satisfaction targets are met and exceeded.
	Ensure all decisions are made in the best interest of the hotels and management.
	Deliver hotel budget goals and set other short and long-term strategic goals for the property.
	Developing improvement actions, and carrying out cost savings.
	A strong understanding of P&amp;L statements and the ability to react with impactful strategies
	Closely monitor the&nbsp;hotel&rsquo;s business report sdaily and make decisions accordingly.
	Ensure that monthly financial outlooks for Rooms, Food &amp; Beverage, Admin &amp; General, are on target and accurate.
	Maximizing room yield and hotel/resort revenue through innovative sales practices and yield management programs.
	Prepare a monthly financial report for the owners and stakeholders.
	Draw up plans and budgets (revenues, costs, etc.) for the owners.
	Helping in the procurement of operating supplies and equipment, and contracting with third-party vendors for essential equipment and services.
	Act as a final decision maker in hiring a key staff.
	Coordination with HOD&rsquo;s for the execution of all activities and functions.
	Overseeing and managing all departments and working closely with department heads daily.
	Manage and develop the Hotel Executive team to ensure career progression and development.
	Be accountable for the responsibilities of department heads and take ownership of all guest complaints.
	Provide effective leadership to hotel team members.
	Lead in all aspects of business planning.
	Respond to audits to ensure continual improvement is achieved.
	Corporate client&nbsp;handling and taking part in new client acquisition along with the sales team whenever required.
	Assisting in residential sales as and when required and developing strong sales prospects.
	Responsible for safeguarding the quality of operations both (internal &amp; external audits).
	Responsible for legalization, Occupational Health &amp;Safety&nbsp;Act, fire regulations, and other legal requirements.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;bphotjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;jobmasters2020@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

General Manager Job at Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our client, an International Brand that runs Hotels across major cities in Nigeria, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Locations: Island and Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Due to increasing activities, our client urgently requires the services of a professional and self-driven General Managers to pilot the affairs in some of its branches located in Lagos Island and Mainland.
	This person must possess a minimum of a First Degree and at least 8 years’ experience within the hospitality industry.
	Possession of a higher degree with some professional certifications are required.
	Having worked in similar position will be a great advantage


Duties and Responsibilities


	Oversee the operations functions of the hotel, as per the Organizational chart.
	Hold regular briefings and meetings with all heads of departments.
	Ensure full compliance with Hotel operating controls, SOPs, policies, procedures, and service standards.
	Lead all key property issues including capital projects, customer service, and refurbishment.
	Handling complaints, and overseeing the service recovery procedures.
	Responsible for the preparation, presentation, and subsequent achievement of the hotel’s annual Operating Budget, Marketing, and sales Plan and Capital Budget.
	Manage the ongoing profitability of the hotel, ensuring revenue and guest satisfaction targets are met and exceeded.
	Ensure all decisions are made in the best interest of the hotels and management.
	Deliver hotel budget goals and set other short and long-term strategic goals for the property.
	Developing improvement actions, and carrying out cost savings.
	A strong understanding of P&L statements and the ability to react with impactful strategies
	Closely monitor the hotel’s business report sdaily and make decisions accordingly.
	Ensure that monthly financial outlooks for Rooms, Food & Beverage, Admin & General, are on target and accurate.
	Maximizing room yield and hotel/resort revenue through innovative sales practices and yield management programs.
	Prepare a monthly financial report for the owners and stakeholders.
	Draw up plans and budgets (revenues, costs, etc.) for the owners.
	Helping in the procurement of operating supplies and equipment, and contracting with third-party vendors for essential equipment and services.
	Act as a final decision maker in hiring a key staff.
	Coordination with HOD’s for the execution of all activities and functions.
	Overseeing and managing all departments and working closely with department heads daily.
	Manage and develop the Hotel Executive team to ensure career progression and development.
	Be accountable for the responsibilities of department heads and take ownership of all guest complaints.
	Provide effective leadership to hotel team members.
	Lead in all aspects of business planning.
	Respond to audits to ensure continual improvement is achieved.
	Corporate client handling and taking part in new client acquisition along with the sales team whenever required.
	Assisting in residential sales as and when required and developing strong sales prospects.
	Responsible for safeguarding the quality of operations both (internal & external audits).
	Responsible for legalization, Occupational Health &Safety Act, fire regulations, and other legal requirements.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Mama Cass is a restaurant that serves authentic African and International meals served with heart, in spaces that feel like home.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Quality Control Manager to oversee and ensure the highest standards of food quality, hygiene, and service delivery across our operations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring processes, conducting inspections, and driving continuous improvement to enhance customer satisfaction and compliance with industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor food preparation, handling, and service to ensure consistent quality and adherence to hygiene and safety standards.
	Conduct routine inspections of kitchens, production areas, storage rooms, service areas, and event setups for cleanliness, organization, and compliance.
	Inspect raw materials, ingredients, packaging, and finished products to ensure they meet company standards before use or distribution.
	Check presentation standards for dine-in, takeaway, and event settings, including plating, packaging, serving, and d&eacute;cor arrangements.
	Identify deviations from quality or hygiene standards and coordinate with relevant teams to implement corrective actions.
	Document inspection findings, maintain quality control logs, and track recurring issues and improvements.
	Train and sensitize outlet and event staff on food safety, hygiene, and quality control procedures.
	Support internal and external audits by ensuring outlets and production teams are inspection-ready at all times.
	Follow up on customer complaints related to product or service quality and verify that corrective measures are implemented.
	Collaborate with kitchen, production, service, and logistics teams to drive continuous improvement in quality and customer satisfaction.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Food Science, Hospitality Management, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of experience in a quality control or food safety role.
	Proven experience in quality control, preferably in the food service or hospitality industry.
	Strong knowledge of food safety and hygiene standards (HACCP, ISO, etc.).
	Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Key Competencies:


	Quality Assurance &amp; Compliance
	Inspection &amp; Audit Management
	Process Improvement
	Team Training &amp; Development
	Documentation &amp; Reporting.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hradmin@mamacassng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.",

Quality Assurance Manager Job at Mama Cass




        
    

        
        Mama Cass is a restaurant that serves authentic African and International meals served with heart, in spaces that feel like home.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Quality Control Manager to oversee and ensure the highest standards of food quality, hygiene, and service delivery across our operations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring processes, conducting inspections, and driving continuous improvement to enhance customer satisfaction and compliance with industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor food preparation, handling, and service to ensure consistent quality and adherence to hygiene and safety standards.
	Conduct routine inspections of kitchens, production areas, storage rooms, service areas, and event setups for cleanliness, organization, and compliance.
	Inspect raw materials, ingredients, packaging, and finished products to ensure they meet company standards before use or distribution.
	Check presentation standards for dine-in, takeaway, and event settings, including plating, packaging, serving, and décor arrangements.
	Identify deviations from quality or hygiene standards and coordinate with relevant teams to implement corrective actions.
	Document inspection findings, maintain quality control logs, and track recurring issues and improvements.
	Train and sensitize outlet and event staff on food safety, hygiene, and quality control procedures.
	Support internal and external audits by ensuring outlets and production teams are inspection-ready at all times.
	Follow up on customer complaints related to product or service quality and verify that corrective measures are implemented.
	Collaborate with kitchen, production, service, and logistics teams to drive continuous improvement in quality and customer satisfaction.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Food Science, Hospitality Management, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of experience in a quality control or food safety role.
	Proven experience in quality control, preferably in the food service or hospitality industry.
	Strong knowledge of food safety and hygiene standards (HACCP, ISO, etc.).
	Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Key Competencies:


	Quality Assurance & Compliance
	Inspection & Audit Management
	Process Improvement
	Team Training & Development
	Documentation & Reporting.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Experience and Retention Officer",
  "description": "Acabado is currently seeking for application from qualified applicants to fill the vacant position of Customer Experience and RetensionOfficer. interested and qualified applicants can apply via the details below Acabado &ndash; We sale bakery products and provide bakers with affordable and available quality raw material that helps to enhance the quality of their baked goods in the shortest of time. Acabado Products continues to grow its vision of becoming the leading provider of essential needs in cake making in West Africa. We continue to sustain and improve on our market leadership in edible colour production, icing sugar, cake syrup, and ready to roll fondant and cake flavours. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Experience and Retention Officer
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and customer-oriented Customer Experience and Retention Officer to enhance customer satisfaction, strengthen client relationships, and drive long-term loyalty.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing customer interactions, resolving issues efficiently, and implementing strategies to improve retention and overall customer experience.


Key Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback.
	Develop and implement strategies to improve customer satisfaction and retention.
	Monitor customer interactions and identify areas for improvement in service delivery.
	Build strong relationships with customers to encourage repeat business and loyalty.
	Analyze customer data and feedback to identify trends and recommend improvements.
	Collaborate with sales, marketing, and operations teams to enhance customer experience.
	Handle escalated customer issues promptly and professionally.
	Design and manage customer engagement initiatives, loyalty programs, and follow-ups.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions.


Key Competencies:


	Customer-centric mindset
	Relationship management
	Conflict resolution
	Time management and organization
	Adaptability and resilience.


Salary
N75,000 - N100,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
